story.text: As the loop, I want to read my own history across all sessions for the patterns that keep recurring — work re-derived again and again, a control valve I advertise but never open, a contradiction I leave un-reconciled — so my self-critique becomes an organ instead of a hand-run chat exercise. Every instrument I grew senses a present state (gaps now, census now, digest over one span); none folds the accumulated record for what keeps happening. The shame beat senses stalling; nothing senses churn. This is that critique made a fold — read-only, evidence cited to log records not prose, naming the pattern and the one move, never judging or editing (the fix stays a session's or bdo's, D-4).

briefing.headline: the retrospective fold: the loop reads its own history for recurring patterns
briefing.value: loop/retro.py — a pure, stdlib, read-only fold over the entire append-only log, sibling of digest on a new axis (digest folds one span; retro folds all history). Three detectors, each cited to real records: churn (an atom re-derived >=2x via versions and/or repeated negating verdicts), dead-valve (a control mode the orchestrator can take but never has across a meaningful run), standing-divergence (a digest divergence left un-reconciled across the history, with its age). It reuses digest's version-split and divergence detection rather than re-deriving them (no second truth, §10).
briefing.why_now: bdo asked for it directly (2026-06-16): author a refinement-and-retrospective node that runs like the digest, reads our own history, and surfaces the recurring patterns to improve on. The loop had every input for a retro (census, digest, gaps, reports) and no organ that folded them into cross-session self-critique.
briefing.if_accepted: The loop gains its first cross-session self-refinement sensor. python -m loop.retro folds all history and names what keeps happening, each finding carrying one concrete refinement move. It proved itself on first run: it surfaced a real digest bug (merge landings counted as refusals, inflating the count to 58 where ~7 were real) which the same change fixes.
briefing.if_rejected: Self-critique stays a hand-run chat exercise; churn, dead valves, and standing divergences keep slipping past the present-state instruments because nothing folds the accumulated record for them.
briefing.cost_of_wrong_call: Low and fail-safe: the fold is read-only (it writes nothing, judges nothing, edits nothing — D-4), additive (a new sibling module beside digest/census/gaps), and reuses existing folds rather than introducing a second truth. Reverting is deleting the module; nothing depends on it.
briefing.mechanism: loop/retro.py: churn_findings / dead_valve_findings / standing_divergence_findings fold over reconcile.Fold and reuse loop.digest's _base_version, _glance, digest, and divergence detection. tests/test_retro.py joins the suite with §10 teeth: it plants a churn pattern (an atom sent back twice before landing) and asserts the finding cites the planted receipt ids — the line a fabricated or constant classifier cannot fake; a clean fixture surfaces nothing; the fold writes nothing. The same change corrects loop/digest.py's landing/refusal count (the bug retro surfaced). Done-line 0098; full suite green at 845.
